data.name: gironda sternum chin
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a high bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:4 Engage your lats and biceps to pull your chest up towards the bar, leading with your sternum.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: glute bridge march
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:3 While keeping your hips lifted, lift one foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest.
Step:4 Lower your foot back to the ground and repeat the movement with the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs in a marching motion while maintaining the bridge position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: glute bridge two legs on bench (male)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench with your back against it and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: glute-ham raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the glute-ham raise machine to fit your body.
Step:2 Position yourself face down on the machine with your ankles secured.
Step:3 Place your hands on your chest or cross them over your chest.
Step:4 Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift your upper body up towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Continue lifting until your body is in a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: gorilla chin
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:4 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, bringing your chin above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: groin crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hack calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight.
Step:2 Stand on the sled machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible by pushing through the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hack one leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to an appropriate weight.
Step:2 Stand on the sled machine with one foot, keeping the other foot off the ground.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:4 Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up on the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch legs and repeat the exercise.

data.name: half knee bends (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: half knee bends (male) with blunt
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair. Emphasize blunt control.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: half sit-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hamstring stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Step forward with your right foot and shift your weight onto your right leg.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the hips, reaching towards your right foot with both hands.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

data.name: hands bike
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and handlebar position to a comfortable level.
Step:2 Sit on the ergometer with your back straight and feet on the pedals.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your hands and position your arms at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Start pedaling with your hands, pushing and pulling the handles in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Continue pedaling for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

data.name: hands clasped circular toe touch (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands clasped together in front of your chest.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Lower your hands towards your toes in a circular motion, reaching as far as you can without straining.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hands reversed clasped circular toe touch (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Reach down with your hands and clasp them together behind your legs.
Step:4 Slowly raise your hands up and over your head in a circular motion, keeping your legs straight.
Step:5 Continue the circular motion until your hands touch your toes.
Step:6 Reverse the motion and bring your hands back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: handstand
instructions: Step:1 Find an open space with enough room to perform a handstand.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Kick your legs up towards the wall, using your core and shoulders to maintain balance.
Step:4 Once in a handstand position, engage your triceps to support your body weight.
Step:5 Hold the handstand for as long as you can maintain balance.
Step:6 To come down, slowly lower your legs back to the ground.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: handstand push-up
instructions: Step:1 Find a wall and face away from it, standing a few feet away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground shoulder-width apart and kick your feet up against the wall, coming into a handstand position.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your head towards the ground, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging leg hip raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up by flexing your hips and knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging leg raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging oblique knee raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging pike
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging pike weak
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground. Emphasize weak control.
Step:4 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging pike with intense
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Step:3 (intense variation) Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging straight leg hip raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging straight leg raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging straight leg raise with elevated
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go. Maintain elevated form throughout.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging straight twisting leg hip raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hanging straight twisting leg hip raise with compound
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight. Perform with compound intensity.
Step:3 Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: high knee against wall
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your right knee up towards your chest, while keeping your left foot on the ground.
Step:4 Quickly switch legs, bringing your left knee up towards your chest and lowering your right foot back down.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs in a running motion, bringing your knees up as high as possible.
Step:6 Maintain a fast pace and keep your upper body stable throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

data.name: high style scapula push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 As you lower, squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward. Focus on high movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hip raise (bent knee)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands by your sides, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and glutes, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hold style dumbbell alternating seated bicep curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder.
Step:4 (hold variation) Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the curl with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating curls for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: horizontal dumbbell standing alternate overhead press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 (horizontal variation) Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hug keens to chest
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position.
Step:3 As you squat down, bring your knees up towards your chest and hug them with your arms.
Step:4 Hold this position for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hyght dumbbell fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hyperextension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your upper thighs are resting on the pad and your feet are secured.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head.
Step:3 Lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: hyperextension (on bench)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your hips are resting comfortably on the pad and your feet are secured.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head.
Step:3 Slowly lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: impossible dips
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air.
Step:2 Bend your knees and cross your ankles.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: improved sphinx
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the ground with your forearms flat on the floor, elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your chest off the ground, keeping your forearms and toes on the floor.
Step:3 Hold this position for a few seconds, making sure to keep your neck in a neutral position.
Step:4 Slowly lower your chest back down to the starting position. Emphasize improved control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inchworm
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then walk your hands back towards your feet, keeping your legs as straight as possible.
Step:5 Once your hands reach your feet, stand back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inchworm v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:4 Keeping your legs straight, walk your feet towards your hands, bringing your hips up towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Continue walking your hands forward, repeating the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: incline close-grip push-up
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, with your body forming a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: incline leg hip raise (leg straight)
instructions: Step:1 Lie on an incline bench with your back flat against the bench and your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the bench, raising them as high as you can while keeping them straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: incline push up depth jump
instructions: Step:1 Find an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, and place your hands shoulder-width apart on the edge.
Step:2 Step your feet back, keeping your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the edge of the surface, bending your elbows and keeping your body aligned.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Jump off the edge of the surface, landing softly with your knees slightly bent.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and depth jump for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: incline push up depth jump with complex
instructions: Step:1 Find an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, and place your hands shoulder-width apart on the edge.
Step:2 Step your feet back, keeping your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the edge of the surface, bending your elbows and keeping your body aligned. Maintain complex form throughout.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Jump off the edge of the surface, landing softly with your knees slightly bent.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and depth jump for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: incline push-up
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: incline push-up (on box)
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the edge of a box or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the box by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: incline push-up (on box) - active variation
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the edge of a box or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the box by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 (active variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: incline reverse grip push-up
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the edge of a bench or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the bench by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: incline scapula push up
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Position your feet on the ground, hip-width apart.
Step:4 Lower your chest towards the bench, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 As you lower, retract your shoulder blades, squeezing your scapulae together.
Step:6 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: incline twisting sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward.
Step:5 As you curl up, twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement, this time twisting your torso to the other side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inclined style pelvic tilt into bridge
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:4 Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground. Emphasize inclined control.
Step:5 Hold the bridge position for a few seconds.
Step:6 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: intense barbell straight leg deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at your hips and lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower the barbell until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Maintain intense form throughout.
Step:5 Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: intense kettlebell two arm row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull the kettlebells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain intense form throughout.

data.name: intensified style kettlebell extended range one arm press on floor
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm. Perform with intensified intensity.

data.name: intermediate hip flexor and quad stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for support.
Step:3 Bend your right knee and bring your right foot towards your glutes, grabbing the rope with your right hand.
Step:4 Slowly pull your right foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your right quad.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Release the stretch and repeat on the left side.

data.name: intermediate style dumbbell preacher curl over exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball.
Step:3 (intermediate variation) Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: intermediate style kneeling plank tap shoulder (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a kneeling position with your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on your toes, and lift your body into a plank position.
Step:3 (intermediate variation) Keeping your core engaged and your hips stable, lift one hand off the ground and tap the opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Return the hand to the ground and repeat with the other hand.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inverse leg curl (bench support)
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a bench with your hips at the edge and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Hold onto the bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper body still, bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inverse leg curl (on pull-up cable machine)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle straps are at the lowest setting.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your legs extended and the ankle straps attached to your feet.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Step:4 Bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inverted row
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height or use a suspension trainer.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grab the bar or handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground.
Step:5 Pull your chest towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inverted row bent knees
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height and lie underneath it.
Step:2 Grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your body is straight.
Step:4 Pull your chest up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inverted row on bench
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bench at a height that allows your body to hang freely underneath it.
Step:2 Lie face up on the ground with your head towards the bench.
Step:3 Reach up and grab the bench with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull your chest up towards the bench.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inverted row v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height on a Smith machine or use a suspension trainer.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer and grab it with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at a slight angle.
Step:4 Keep your body straight and pull your chest up towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inverted row with straps
instructions: Step:1 Set up a suspension trainer or straps at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point and grab the handles with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at an angle.
Step:4 Keep your body straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull your chest towards the handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: inverted style inverse leg curl (on pull-up cable machine)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle straps are at the lowest setting.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your legs extended and the ankle straps attached to your feet.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Step:4 Bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain inverted form throughout.

data.name: inverted style smith seated shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level. Maintain inverted form throughout.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: iron cross stretch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:2 Raise your legs up towards the ceiling, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the floor with your feet.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return your legs to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the stretch on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: iron cross stretch - deep variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:2 Raise your legs up towards the ceiling, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the floor with your feet.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return your legs to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the stretch on the other side. Maintain deep form throughout.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: isolation assisted seated pectoralis major stretch with stability ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a stability ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Slowly lower the stability ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your pectoral muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Emphasize isolation control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: isometric chest squeeze
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground, with your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Squeeze your chest muscles together as hard as you can, while keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your chest muscles.
Step:5 Release the squeeze and relax your chest muscles.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: isometric wipers
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying flat on your back on a mat or bench.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, perpendicular to your body.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift both legs off the ground, keeping them together and straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the ground with your feet while maintaining control.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then use your core to lift your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time lowering your legs to the opposite side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: jack burpee
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position, placing your hands on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back, landing in a push-up position.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, lowering your chest to the ground and then pushing back up.
Step:5 Jump your feet forward, landing in a squat position.
Step:6 Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead.
Step:7 Land softly and immediately lower back into the squat position to begin the next repetition.

data.name: jack jump (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet together and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Jump up, spreading your feet apart and raising your arms above your head.
Step:3 As you land, quickly jump back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: jackknife sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms overhead.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: janda sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: jump rope
instructions: Step:1 Hold the handles of the jump rope with your hands, palms facing inward.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Swing the rope over your head and jump over it as it comes towards your feet.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet and repeat the jump as the rope comes around again.
Step:5 Continue jumping for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

data.name: jump squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Jump explosively off the ground, extending your hips, knees, and ankles.
Step:4 While in mid-air, quickly bring your arms forward for balance.
Step:5 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next repetition.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: jump squat v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees fully.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately lower your body back into a squat position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell advanced windmill
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in your right hand, with your arm extended overhead and your palm facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your left foot slightly to the right, and shift your weight onto your left leg.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and hinge at the hip, lowering your torso towards the left side.
Step:5 Keep your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell.
Step:6 As you lower your torso, allow your right leg to straighten and your right foot to pivot slightly.
Step:7 Lower your torso until you feel a stretch in your left hamstring and your right arm is pointing towards the ground.
Step:8 Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: kettlebell alternating hang clean
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Allow the kettlebells to hang in front of your body with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders.

Step:5 As the kettlebells reach shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebells in the rack position, with your palms facing inward and the kettlebells resting on the outside of your forearms.
Step:6 Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Step:7 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell alternating press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Press one kettlebell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Lower the kettlebell back to shoulder height.
Step:4 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell alternating press on floor
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand, with your palms facing towards your feet and your arms extended straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Lower one kettlebell down towards your shoulder while keeping the other kettlebell extended straight up.
Step:4 Press the lowered kettlebell back up to the starting position while simultaneously lowering the other kettlebell down towards your shoulder.
Step:5 Continue alternating the press motion with each kettlebell for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell alternating renegade row
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands gripping the kettlebells and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Pull one kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell alternating row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull one kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell arnold press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, rotating your palms to face forward as you extend your arms.
Step:3 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell arnold press - beginner variation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, rotating your palms to face forward as you extend your arms. Emphasize beginner control.
Step:3 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell bent press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and press the kettlebell overhead with your right arm, keeping your elbow locked.
Step:3 Rotate your torso to the left, shifting your weight onto your left foot.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and lower your torso towards the ground, keeping your right arm extended overhead.
Step:5 As you lower, keep your eyes on the kettlebell and your chest lifted.
Step:6 Once your left hand touches the ground, push through your left foot and straighten your left leg, driving your hips forward.
Step:7 As you drive your hips forward, use your core and right arm to press the kettlebell back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: kettlebell bottoms up clean from the hang position
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Allow the kettlebell to hang down between your legs, with your arm fully extended.
Step:4 In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while pulling the kettlebell up towards your shoulder.
Step:5 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist so that the bottom of the kettlebell is facing up.
Step:6 Catch the kettlebell at shoulder height with your elbow bent and your palm facing up.
Step:7 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: kettlebell double alternating hang clean
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Allow the kettlebells to hang straight down in front of your body.
Step:4 In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while shrugging your shoulders.
Step:5 As the kettlebells rise, pull them up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows high and out to the sides.
Step:6 Catch the kettlebells at shoulder height, with your palms facing inward and your elbows pointing forward.
Step:7 Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell double jerk
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Bend your knees and quickly drop into a partial squat.
Step:5 Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving the kettlebells overhead.
Step:6 Lock out your arms and catch the kettlebells overhead with your knees slightly bent.
Step:7 Stand up straight and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell double push press
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Initiate the movement by explosively extending your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the kettlebells overhead.
Step:4 As the kettlebells reach the top, press them fully overhead, locking out your arms.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebells back to the starting position by bending your elbows and bringing them back down to shoulder height.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell double snatch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at arm's length in front of your thighs.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back flat and chest up.
Step:3 In one explosive motion, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, and simultaneously pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 As the kettlebells reach shoulder level, rotate your wrists and punch the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell double windmill
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand.
Step:2 Extend your right arm overhead, keeping your eyes on the kettlebell.
Step:3 Rotate your left foot 45 degrees to the left and your right foot 90 degrees to the right.
Step:4 Bend at the waist to the left, keeping your right arm extended overhead.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, reaching towards your left foot.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your right foot to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: kettlebell extended range one arm press on floor
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: kettlebell figure 8
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Pass the kettlebell between your legs, switching hands as it reaches the back of your legs.
Step:4 As the kettlebell comes forward, pass it to the other hand between your legs.
Step:5 Continue passing the kettlebell between your legs in a figure 8 motion.
Step:6 Maintain a steady pace and engage your core throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell front squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your chest, close to your body.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair.
Step:4 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell goblet squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell close to your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell hang clean
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, allowing it to swing between your legs.
Step:4 Quickly extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height.
Step:5 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbow tucked in and the kettlebell resting on your forearm.
Step:6 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position between your legs, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell lunge pass through
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, pass the kettlebell under your right thigh and transfer it to your left hand.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot to return to the starting position, while simultaneously passing the kettlebell back to your right hand.
Step:5 Repeat the lunge on the opposite side, passing the kettlebell under your left thigh.
Step:6 Continue alternating lunges and passing the kettlebell between hands for the desired number of repetitions.
